description:
Practical backlog summary anchor: **Tier 2 → Reflection robustness and retry ladder**.

Backlog detail: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 2 / section 7. Reflection robustness and retry ladder**.

Implementation context:
- reflection is currently triggered in `packages/pi-om-extension/src/engine.ts`
- reflector prompting/parsing lives in `src/prompts.ts` and `src/agents.ts`
- state persistence and fallback behavior live in `src/state.ts` and the observation-cycle save path in `src/engine.ts`
- today the reflector result is mostly trusted if it returns non-empty observations

What this epic should establish:
- detection of degenerate or obviously lossy reflector output
- bounded retry/fallback behavior before useful observations are replaced
- explicit preservation of pre-reflection state when the retry path still fails

Useful references:
- backlog doc section 7
- local reflection-cycle tests in `src/__tests__/integration`
- this epic is intentionally gated on Tier 1 so it builds on stronger completion, temporal, specificity, and layout semantics

Keep the implementation pragmatic; the goal is to avoid silent memory damage, not to build a full validation framework.
title: Harden reflection robustness with retry and fallback behavior
